heading: Purposes
label: 30902 Purposes
text: The purposes of the corporation are to promote, through organization, and cooperation with other agencies, the ability of boys to do things for themselves and others, to train them in scoutcraft, and to teach them patriotism, courage, self-reliance, and kindred virtues, using the methods that were in common use by boy scouts on .June 15, 1916
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)3090236:23., .June 15, 1916, ch. 148, § 339 Stat. 228
